response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. While technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node, AWS, Kubernetes) far exceed requirements, the seniority mismatch creates high retention risk, likely salary expectations far above budget, and potential cultural fit issues with an entry-level IC position. Berlin location aligns, but the high on-site requirement and entry-level scope make this a poor mutual fit.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React expertise far exceeding required level
Strong fullstack background spanning databases, APIs, and infrastructure
Berlin-based with relevant AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/agent tooling exposure
concerns: Massive overqualification — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role
High flight risk and likely salary expectations exceeding junior budget
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed; limited renewable energy/construction domain exposure
